name: Mulled Rosemary Wine & Black Tea
recipeIngredient: 1 Bottle claret (or other full-bodied red wine)
1 quart Black tea (preferably Assam or Darjeeling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the wine and tea into a noncorroding saucepan.
2. Add the honey, sugar, oranges, spices, and rosemary.
3. Heat over low heat until barely steaming.
4. Stir until the honey is dissolved.
5. Remove the pan from the heat, cover, and let stand for at least 30 minutes.
6. When ready to serve, reheat until just steaming and serve hot.
Note: If you have leftovers, remove the oranges and rosemary, let the punch cool to room temperature, then refrigerate. Reheated gently with fresh oranges and rosemary, the punch will be a bit stronger but still quite enjoyable.
